description: Represents an SMTP API token for transactional email sending

id.description: The unique identifier for the SMTP token

campaignName.description: The name of the email campaign associated with this token

emailCampaignId.description: The ID of the associated email campaign

createContact.description: Whether sending an email creates a contact if one doesn't exist

createdBy.description: The user or application that created the token

title: SmtpToken
